title: trochiscus cochlearioides
intro: Trochiscus cochlearioides, also known as the ear-flower or ear-shaped flower, is a plant species that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Trochiscus cochlearioides include its ability to reduce fever, treat skin infections, and alleviate digestive issues, among others. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infused in water to make a tea, and it can also be used in the form of a poultice or salve to apply topically for skin conditions.
